title: Neighbors of Iran, Azerbaijan and Armenia fear regional spillover of conflict
subhead: Two Iranian drones struck Azerbaijan's Nakhchivan region on Thursday, raising fears of an expansion of hostilities in the South Caucasus, as Baku maintains close ties with Israel.

title: Iranian school hit by air strike: Le Monde's investigation confirms many civilian victims, including children
subhead: Videos obtained and analyzed by Le Monde confirmed that the bombing of a school in Minab, Iran, on the first day of joint US-Israeli strikes on the country, caused many civilian victims, including children.

title: EU lawmakers welcome Iran regime's fall, but fear what comes next
subhead: Except for the Spanish prime minister, European governments have remained silent since the start of hostilities in Iran. Before a March 11 plenary session, political groups in the European Parliament are seeking the right balance.

title: Footage from the Strait of Hormuz reveals how the war in Iran has disrupted global maritime traffic
subhead: Maritime traffic data, video footage and satellite images document how oil and gas infrastructure, along with several ships, have been affected by the war involving Israel, the United States and Iran.

title: In Dubai, thousands of tourists left stranded by war in Iran
subhead: While 'very limited' airspace has reopened, the United Arab Emirates remains, with 196 missiles and more than 1,000 drones – most shot down in flight – the territory most targeted by Iranian strikes in the Middle East.

How Israel and the US are waging their most intense air war in decades on Iran
subhead: The coordinated US-Israeli forces have devised 'unprecedented' operations to establish their military dominance over Iran, destroy its missile launchers and factories and gain control of their adversary's airspace.

title: In rural France, a grisly death and a lingering question: Which of the dogs killed her?
subhead: Elisa Pilarski, 29 and six months pregnant, was found partially dismembered with dog bites in November 2019 in a northern French forest. She had been walking her partner's illegally imported pit bull. Christophe Ellul, the dog owner, is now standing trial and has been fighting against the idea that his dog was the sole killer.

title: Iran's neighbors, under drone attacks, confront their vulnerability
subhead: Lacking experience in countering kamikaze drones, especially the infamous Shahed models, the Gulf countries have shown how unprepared they were for the threat posed by Iran, which is determined to exploit their vulnerability.
